subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the people of fidelity, worthy and deserving, who hold fast to the Covenant and cling to the Testament. Blessed is the soul that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ثنا اهل وفا را لایق و سزا که بمیثاق متمسکند و بعهد متشبث طوبی از برای نفسیکه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @business; financial; property matters, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
